arts.sum: Real Madrid saw their first leg advantage wiped out early on against Real Sociedad, but they are now back ahead on aggregate in their Copa del Rey semi-final tie. arts.ttl: Finally, a defensive injury that’s good news for Real Madrid
arts.sum: When the ball finally went out of play, Gabriel was immediately substituted and now looks like a major doubt for the Madrid game next week. The Polish defender is a versatile deputy but he’s a long way short of a regular starter for the Gunners and Gabriel’s absence would significantly weaken Mikel Arteta’s team.
